headline: Teledyne e2v Strengthens Space-Grade ADC Offering with Radiation Robustness Results
summary: GRENOBLE, France, July 01, 2026--Teledyne e2v Semiconductors today announced new radiation test results for its EV10AS940, a 10-bit, 12.8 GSps, Ka-band-capable analog-to-digital converter, or ADC, developed for demanding space payloads and mission-critical applications.

raw.headline: Teledyne e2v Strengthens Space-Grade ADC Offering with Radiation Robustness Results
raw.summary: GRENOBLE, France, July 01, 2026--Teledyne e2v Semiconductors today announced new radiation test results for its EV10AS940, a 10-bit, 12.8 GSps, Ka-band-capable analog-to-digital converter, or ADC, developed for demanding space payloads and mission-critical applications.

headline: Teledyne FLIR Defense Partners With STORM to Extend Black Recon Missions Across More Vehicle Platforms
summary: OSLO, Norway, July 01, 2026--Teledyne FLIR Defense, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE: TDY), and STORM have announced a partnership that will bring Teledyne FLIR’s Black Recon™ vehicle reconnaissance system to RADS™, the Rapid Adapt and Deploy System. As a RADS Application Partner, Teledyne FLIR gains a standardised route to field Black Recon across many more vehicle types, while joining STORM’s growing ecosystem of certified technology partners. The partnership was signed at Euro

As a RADS Application Partner, Teledyne FLIR gains a standardised route to field Black Recon across many more vehicle types, while joining STORM’s growing ecosystem of certified technology partners.
